rationale: Adding stack trace to ErrTooSmall for debugging; internal error ergonomics improvement, no spec rule violated.
Array traversal bug in internal Document.Lookup implementation; no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Nil pointer handling for *bson.Document methods; internal robustness fix, no spec rule contradicted.
Internal refactor to use insertion-ordered map in ops.Find; no specific spec rule violated.
API design improvement separating FindOne options from Find; no explicit spec rule cited.
Documentation improvement for Encoder/Decoder valid types; docs issue, no spec behavior involved.
Internal package restructuring moving options package; no spec behavior change.
Missing documentation for BSON struct tags; docs issue only, no spec violation.
Adding 'comment' parameter to aggregate command; missing feature addition, thin description.
BSON decoder bug for nested bson types in structs; internal decoding issue, no specific spec rule cited.
BSON array decode into empty interface fails; internal decoder limitation, no specific BSON spec rule cited.
Documentation examples bug; cursor reset missing in docs, no spec behavior involved.
Dependency management (dep tool) build error; packaging/build issue, no spec behavior.
Internal BSON Value.d property not copied in convertValueToElem; implementation bug, no spec rule cited.
Library restructuring from mongo/private to mongo/core; internal refactor, no behavior change.
Excessive escaping bug in BSON String() printing method; display issue, no spec rule violated.
ObjectID encoded as Binary instead of BSON ObjectId; BSON type mapping issue, no explicit spec rule cited but likely spec-relevant.
Nil struct property handling in BSON encoder; internal robustness fix with no specific contradicted spec rule.
Document.Set replaces wrong field due to index bug; internal implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Cursor.Close error semantics clarification; API ergonomics improvement, no specific spec rule cited.
TLS configuration refactored out of connection.New for cleaner code; internal refactor only.
Internal cleanup using db.writeSelector in RunCommand instead of creating new ReadPrefSelector.
Internal refactor moving server selectors from topology to description package; no behavior change.
Internal refactor reusing parent Database selectors in Collection; no behavior change.
Internal cleanup using description.WriteSelector instead of ReadPrefSelector for writes; no behavior change.
Internal refactor of ReadPrefSelector to use feature.MaxStaleness function; no behavior change.
ClientOptions API refactor; internal design improvement, no spec behavior change.
ObjectID with bson tag stored as Binary; related to GODRIVER-324 encoder fix, no explicit spec rule cited.
Missing support for PEM file passwords in SSL client certs; feature gap, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Misfiled support question about Spring Data MongoDB (Java ORM); not a Go driver issue at all.
Clone of misfiled Spring Data MongoDB support question; not a Go driver issue.
Adding license notices to core library files; purely administrative, no spec behavior.
Misfiled user support question about creating collections; not a driver bug.
mongo.newClient incorrectly calls topology.Connect; internal design bug, no specific spec rule cited.
ConnectTimeout not applied to default dialer; connection timeout handling bug, no specific spec rule cited.
SocketTimeout not set as read/write timeouts; connection configuration bug, no specific spec rule cited.
API design: option.Optioner type updated to return error; internal ergonomics, no spec behavior change.
Server selection spec mandates 30000ms default serverSelectionTimeoutMS; driver had no default, blocking indefinitely.
Compile error on 386 platforms due to uint overflow; build/portability issue, no spec behavior.
Panic when nil context passed to Cursor#Next; crash/robustness bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Connection string serverSelectionTimeoutMS not applied to topology; spec requires it to override default.
Duplicate key errors silently swallowed by InsertMany/InsertOne; error propagation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Semaphore permit leaked on dial error in connection pool; implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule cited.
Race condition causing deadlock when disconnecting pool; implementation concurrency bug, no specific CMAP spec rule.
Connection acquisition can be starved indefinitely under heavy load; implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule.
Test examples fail on Mac with 'topology is closed'; test/environment issue, no spec behavior.
Connection leak in cursor and dispatch code; resource management bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Adding bson.Zeroer interface for struct zero-value detection; internal BSON library improvement, no spec rule.
Missing time.Time, url.URL, json.Number support in BSON encoder/decoder; feature addition, no spec rule cited.
Adding decimal128 type support in BSON encoder; missing feature addition, no spec rule contradicted.
